privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated text specification dynamically created via setup_task.sh. The specification is loosely based on a real-world Hartzell HC-B4TN propeller. The agent is required to construct a new 3D model in OpenVSP from a blank canvas. It has been verified that the expected output path '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/kingair_propeller.vsp3', component name 'HC-B4TN', blade count of 4.0, diameter of 2.36 meters, precone angle of 2.5 degrees, and minimum of 3 cross-sections perfectly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt, setup scripts, and verifier.py XML parsing logic.
